name: mtgi-skills
description: Internal Claude Cowork plugin marketplace for MTGI workflows — RFQ normalization, sourcing, and other trading-floor data tools.

plugins.name: rfq-normalizer
plugins.description: Normalize any vendor RFQ spreadsheet (xlsx/csv) into MTGI's canonical historical-import template. Auto-detects the header row and drops summary footers, extracts a clean MPN, splits free-text into five typed spec columns (capacity, interface, drive type, form factor, manufacturer), preserves extra vendor columns, normalizes conditions, and enriches missing fields via the eBay Browse API and Brave web search — with per-cell provenance, a needs-review report, and vendor-SKU swap detection.
